task_completion.description: Access the SEB Server web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:8080 showing the SEB Server login page or dashboard.
The SEB Server interface shows 'Math_Final_Offline' in the list of Exam Configurations, or a creation form is visible with this name and the Start URL 'https://math.edu/exam'.
The SEB Server interface shows 'Physics_Final_Offline' in the list of Exam Configurations, or a creation form is visible with this name and the Start URL 'https://physics.edu/exam'.
The SEB Server interface shows 'Bio_Final_Offline' in the list of Exam Configurations, or a creation form is visible with this name and the Start URL 'https://bio.edu/exam'.

task_completion.description: Export the Math configuration as a .seb file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, download dialog, or terminal shows 'Math_Final_Offline.seb' located in the '~/Documents/ExamBackups' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the Physics configuration as a .seb file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, download dialog, or terminal shows 'Physics_Final_Offline.seb' located in the '~/Documents/ExamBackups' directory.

task_completion.description: Export the Bio configuration as a .seb file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager, download dialog, or terminal shows 'Bio_Final_Offline.seb' located in the '~/Documents/ExamBackups' directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the SEB Server GUI via a web browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the SEB Server interface, rather than just API calls via curl or python scripts.

integrity.description: The .seb files were genuinely exported/downloaded from the browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser download notifications, save-as dialogs, or file manager views showing actual .seb files, not empty files created via terminal commands like 'touch'.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent did not just rename existing files or create fake text files with .seb extensions to bypass the export process.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must create three configurations in SEB Server: 'Math_Final_Offline' (URL: https://math.edu/exam), 'Physics_Final_Offline' (URL: https://physics.edu/exam), and 'Bio_Final_Offline' (URL: https://bio.edu/exam). These must be exported as exactly-named '.seb' files into the '/home/ga/Documents/ExamBackups' directory.
